transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-05]
[00:00] You: Sales targets and deadline review for Q3.
[00:35] Speaker 1: We're closing the books on Q2 on July 10th. Final revenue number needs to be locked by then.
[01:10] Speaker 2: The Q3 midpoint check-in is August 15th. We'll review pipeline health and adjust forecasts if needed.
[01:45] Speaker 3: The end of Q3 is September 30th. We need $3.2M in bookings.
[02:20] You: What's the drop-dead date for closing the Horizon deal?
[02:35] Speaker 1: Horizon's fiscal year ends July 31st. If we don't close by then, it moves to their next fiscal year and we lose the budget allocation.
[03:05] Speaker 2: I'll prioritize Horizon this week and next. I'm targeting a signed contract by July 25th to give us buffer.
[03:35] Speaker 3: The Atlas contract renewal comes up at the end of the month — July 31st. I'll reach out to their VP by July 14th.
[04:00] You: What about the new enterprise pilot program?
[04:15] Speaker 1: The pilot program kicks off on August 1st and runs for 60 days — so it wraps up around September 30th.
[04:50] Speaker 2: The CFO wants a mid-quarter board update. That's scheduled for August 20th. We'll need the sales summary to him by August 18th.
[05:20] You: And the annual customer conference is in the fall — we haven't locked the exact dates yet, but probably late October.

action_items.description: Prioritize Horizon deal to close before July 25th
action_items.source_quote: I'm targeting a signed contract by July 25th to give us buffer.

action_items.description: Reach out to Atlas VP about contract renewal
action_items.source_quote: I'll reach out to their VP by July 14th.

decisions: Q3 booking target is $3.2M by September 30th
Horizon must close by July 31st (their fiscal year end) or budget is lost

dates.description: End of Q3 / Q3 booking target deadline
Horizon fiscal year end / deal deadline
Atlas renewal / reach out to VP
